symbols: floating figures in the night sky — the dream state where boundaries dissolve
deep blue — the nocturnal realm of visions and dreams
two figures intertwined — connection and intimacy in the dream world
description: A painting on a deep blue background showing two stylized human figures floating or flying through space. One figure is rendered in blues and greys, the other in golden-yellow. They appear to be intertwined or reaching for each other, their bodies elongated and abstracted. The style is expressionist with textured, rough brushwork. The figures seem weightless, suspended in the nocturnal blue space. A rough ground or cloud appears at the bottom.
